summary.recommendation: Proceed to Step 5 (REFINEMENT). Best accuracy 75.2% is below the 80% structural-health threshold, suggesting ONE OR TWO targeted sign fixes + epistasis-dilution fixes could yield substantial gains. Priority fixes (from failure_analysis): (1) BZR1→TB1 sign — causes T115, T114, T161; (2) CK signalling cascade HK4→AHP→RR21→IPA1 — causes T038, T039, T152, T200; (3) Shade path missing — T159; (4) Geometric-mean dilution in combined transgenics (T097/T121, T098/T099, T137/T138, T153, T194). Several unfixable failures are genuine Trap-5 / framework-limitation cases (T083, T084, T093, T105, T163). Do NOT restructure the network wholesale — the 90.6% accuracy on single-KOs and the substantial κ band on the easy stratum (κ=0.73) indicate the core SL/MOC/TCP cascade is sound.

comparison.strengths: Best overall accuracy, MCC, and kappa. Handles pure KO/OE cleanly (90.6% on knockouts, 85.7% on OE).
comparison.weaknesses: Combined-transgenic and background-rescue tests collapse to ratio≈1.0 (geometric-mean dilution). Trap-5 framework limitations. Fails on Brassinosteroid/BZR1 arm — possible structural sign issue.

comparison.strengths: Perfect convergence (100%). Slightly better unchanged-class recall (85.7% vs 42.9%). Higher MCC than kappa suggests better per-class balance in confusion matrix.
comparison.weaknesses: Lower overall accuracy (-4.3 pp vs. Algebraic) because Hill dynamics amplify small perturbations; many CK-pathway tests show ratio 7.75 (Hill saturation). 48 failures vs. 41 for Algebraic.

comparison.strengths: Converges stably. Reveals graph-topology weaknesses: SL-biosynthesis tests (T017-T019) show signal≈0 meaning SL nodes are too-weakly connected to Tiller_Number in signed-walk sense.
comparison.weaknesses: κ=0.25 (fair), MCC=0.17. 70 failures — signed RWR cannot capture the non-linear gain in the SL/CK cascades. Unchanged class F1=0.0.
